name: Claim denied because 'not serious enough' in Millcreek—what now?

mainEntity.name: Claim denied because 'not serious enough' in Millcreek—what now?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal to Labor Commission showing medical need/impact; explore third-party if others at fault.** Common tactic[3]. **Key factors:** 1. 20-day appeal window. 2. New evidence allowed. 3. Comp minimums low. 4. Suit alternative. Gather doctor notes. Lawyer overturns denials often.
